title: Vampire's Delight
description: A compatibility mod for Vampirism and Farmer's Delight with garlic aftertaste.
body: ## 📖 About: Vampire's Delight is an addon for Farmer's Delight and Vampirism with the aim of nourishing vampires as well as humans. ### 📦 **Beta Version** This mod is **under development**, that's why it may be unstable sometimes. Report **any** issues to **GitBub**, it can be found in **External resources**. ### 🔨 **Dependencies** Requires Farmer's Delight and Vampirism 1.10+ ## 📊 Common Questions: **Q: What to do if I found a bug/glitch/just weird thing?** **A:** Report any issues to GitHub or our Discord server, both can be found in **External resources** on this page. **Q: Can I use this mod into my modpack/server?** **A:** Yes, feel free to add Vampire's Delight to your modpack/server. **Q: Can I use this mod in my video?** **A:** Yes, of course! I am always happy to see videos mentioning this mod. **Q: Can you backport the mod to 1.19/1.18/1.12?** **A:** No, it will never be backported to older versions because of technical differences making it too complex to make. Please don't ask for backports. **Q: Can I reupload this mod to other site, maybe even under my name?** **A:** Please, do NOT do that. I think I don't need to explain why. It simply violates fair use. It doesn't affect sharing mod files on social media and such non-commerical usages. ## 🎨 Authors: ### 🔧 Developers: - **GridExpert** ### 🍒 **Special thanks to**: - **Cheaterpaul** (Code) - **Lunofe (Zin)** (Code/Balance) - **Fluffy_Nuar** (Ideas) - **HidekiHrk** (Code) ### 📕 **Translators**: - ru_Ru - **DimensionPainter** - fr_Fr - **Cursed Shadow** - fr_Ca - **Cursed Shadow** ### 🛎️ **Credits** - Farmer's Delight mod - **Vectorwing** - Vampirism mod - **Maxanier**, **Cheaterpaul**
